DEV.title: Towards Accurate Model Selection in Deep Unsupervised Domain Adaptation

methods.name: Uniform random candidate
methods.formula: analytic expectation under probability 1/81 for every canonical candidate
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: ERM anchor
methods.formula: select the unique ERM anchor in each context
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Final OACI checkpoint
methods.formula: select OACI trajectory_order=40
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Final SRC checkpoint
methods.formula: select SRC trajectory_order=40
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: OACI cadence midpoint
methods.formula: select OACI trajectory_order=20
methods.deviation: B4 expanded prospectively into one midpoint per trajectory family

methods.name: SRC cadence midpoint
methods.formula: select SRC trajectory_order=20
methods.deviation: B4 expanded prospectively into one midpoint per trajectory family

methods.name: Oracle-best candidate
methods.formula: minimum held-evaluation regret over 81 candidates
methods.deviation: never enters selector comparison or taxonomy

methods.name: Source-validation balanced accuracy
methods.formula: mean across source domains of macro class recall from frozen source predictions
methods.inputs: source predictions labels and domain IDs
methods.deviation: frozen source audit rather than a newly held-out source training fold

methods.name: Source-validation negative NLL
methods.formula: negative mean source NLL with equal source-domain weighting
methods.inputs: source probabilities labels and domain IDs
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Source-LODO
methods.formula: mean held-source-domain score from models retrained without each source domain
methods.deviation: required folds do not exist and new training is forbidden

methods.name: Historical strict-source F2 candidate
methods.formula: exact registered cross-fitted F2 predicted utility per candidate
methods.inputs: frozen per-candidate cross-fitted predictions for both seeds
methods.deviation: committed compact artifacts contain qualification aggregates but no execution-bound per-candidate selector descriptor

methods.name: Mean maximum softmax probability
methods.formula: mean_i max_k p_ik
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Negative predictive entropy
methods.formula: mean_i sum_k p_ik log(p_ik)
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Negative average energy
methods.formula: mean_i logsumexp_k(logit_ik) with T=1
methods.deviation: temperature fixed prospectively at 1

methods.name: Information maximization
methods.formula: H(mean_i p_i)-mean_i H(p_i)
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Normalized nuclear norm
methods.formula: nuclear_norm(P)/sqrt(min(N,K)*N)
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Difference of Confidence
methods.formula: source_domain_balanced_BAcc + mean_target_MSP - mean_source_MSP
methods.inputs: source labels probabilities domains and target probabilities
methods.deviation: balanced-accuracy adaptation is declared because the endpoint is balanced accuracy

methods.name: Average Thresholded Confidence MC
methods.formula: threshold source MSP at quantile 1-source_domain_balanced_BAcc; score is target fraction MSP above threshold
methods.inputs: source labels probabilities domains and target probabilities
methods.deviation: ATC-MC fixed; balanced domain weighting matches the registered endpoint

methods.name: Importance-weighted cross-validation
methods.formula: source validation loss weighted by p_target(x)/p_source(x)
methods.inputs: frozen density ratios on source validation rows
methods.deviation: no frozen density-ratio estimator exists; fitting one is a new model

methods.name: Deep Embedded Validation
methods.formula: importance-weighted validation with embedded domain discrimination and control variate
methods.inputs: frozen DEV domain discriminator weights and embedded validation contract
methods.deviation: required discriminator is absent and fitting it is forbidden

methods.name: Importance-weighted group accuracy estimation
methods.formula: optimized group-weighted source accuracy estimate for target vicinity
methods.inputs: prospectively defined groups and frozen optimized group weights
methods.deviation: groups and fitted weights are absent; creating them would invent a new estimator

methods.name: MaNo p4
methods.formula: delta=mean uniform cross-entropy over full target set; if delta>5 use softmax(logits), else row-L1-normalize(logits+1+logits^2/2-row_min); score=L4(P)/(N*K)^(1/4)
methods.deviation: order-invariant whole-set delta replaces official first-five-loader-batch estimate; p=4 and scaling branch otherwise exact to official commit b9c0262

methods.name: Confidence Optimal Transport
methods.formula: 1-mean optimal assignment L_infinity cost between target probability rows and one-hot source-empirical-prior support
methods.inputs: target probabilities and source empirical class prior
methods.deviation: noninteger prior counts use deterministic largest-remainder apportionment tied by class ID

methods.name: Confidence Optimal Transport with Thresholding
methods.formula: COT per-row matched costs; threshold calibrated on source true-class costs so above-threshold fraction equals source error; score is target fraction below threshold
methods.inputs: source labels probabilities and target probabilities
methods.deviation: source empirical prior primary; uniform prior registered sensitivity only

methods.name: Soft Neighborhood Density
methods.formula: mean_i entropy(softmax_j(cos(q_i,q_j)/0.05),j!=i), q_i=L2_normalize(target_probability_i)
methods.deviation: paper softmax-output feature layer fixed; diagonal excluded exactly

methods.name: Agreement-on-the-Line
methods.formula: fit OLS Phi^-1(target_pair_agreement)=a*Phi^-1(source_pair_agreement)+b over all unordered candidate pairs; candidate score=Phi(a*Phi^-1(source_domain_balanced_BAcc)+b)
methods.inputs: source and target-unlabeled predictions plus source labels and domains
methods.deviation: agreement proportions use fixed Jeffreys correction (count+0.5)/(n+1); pairs are fit observations but never scientific N

methods.name: Accuracy-on-the-Line diagnostic
methods.formula: post-freeze association between source and held-evaluation utilities across candidates
methods.inputs: frozen source score and evaluation utility
methods.deviation: evaluation labels make this measurement-only and exclude it from selection taxonomy

methods.name: Frozen Q0 B=1
methods.formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 B=1 selection distribution without recomputation
methods.deviation: post-C80 outcome-informed primary labeled comparator

methods.name: Frozen Q0 B=2
methods.formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 B=2 selection distribution
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Frozen Q0 B=4
methods.formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 B=4 selection distribution
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Frozen Q0 B=8
methods.formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 B=8 selection distribution
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Frozen Q0 B=16
methods.formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 B=16 selection distribution
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Frozen Q0 B=32
methods.formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 B=32 selection distribution
methods.deviation: none

methods.name: Frozen Q0 FULL
methods.formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 FULL selection distribution
methods.deviation: FULL remains cell-specific and is not relabeled 61
